findings.issue: TDD Anchor section kept as narrative explaining why no test is written, instead of being deleted per template guidance. Template states: 'For non-code tasks (user instructions, deploy, config) — delete this section.' Task 5 is a code task but has no Phase 1 unit test (per D8). Either the section should be deleted cleanly (as done in Task 3), or the narrative is acceptable but inconsistent with Task 3's approach.
findings.fix: Delete the TDD Anchor section entirely and move the note about D8/no-test-rationale into Details → Implementation hints or Description, matching how Task 3 handled the same situation (inline bullet in Details).

findings.issue: TDD Anchor section is cleanly deleted from section level (good), but a bullet '**TDD Anchor:** Не применимо...' is placed inside Details section at line 169. This is slightly non-standard — Details is for Files/Dependencies/Edge cases/Implementation hints per template.
findings.fix: Move the TDD Anchor rationale bullet into a dedicated note in Description or under Implementation hints, rather than as a top-level Details bullet.

findings.issue: Path style inconsistency: project.md and architecture.md use home-dir tilde (`~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/project.md`), while patterns.md uses relative (`../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/patterns.md`). Tasks 1-4 uniformly use `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/*` for all three files.
findings.fix: Normalize all three links to the same relative style used by Tasks 1-4: `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md`, `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md`, `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/patterns.md`.

findings.issue: Internal inconsistency: TDD Anchor declares 2 test methods (`loadFromFixture_returnsListOfTwoModels`, `loadFromFixture_allModelsHaveRequiredFields`), but Acceptance Criteria and Smoke verification state `./gradlew :core-runtime:test → BUILD SUCCESSFUL + 1 passed test`. Should be 2 passed tests (or 1 suite / 2 methods as stated in Automated section).
findings.fix: Align wording: change '1 passed test' to '2 passed tests' in AC (line 80) and Smoke (line 117), or phrase as '1 suite / 2 methods passed' consistently across sections.

findings.issue: Details section is missing an explicit 'Edge cases' subsection header — edge cases are listed but come AFTER 'Implementation hints' rather than in template order (Files → Dependencies → Edge cases → Implementation hints). Content is present; ordering is inverted.
findings.fix: Reorder Details subsections to match template: Files, Dependencies, Edge cases, Implementation hints.

findings.issue: Tech-spec global TAC list includes TAC-5 (production code uses only Log.e — 0 occurrences of Log.(i|w|d)). Task 3 Implementation hints mention 'заранее вычистить' Log.i/w/d but no AC item asserts it. Could surface during Task 11 audit rather than here.
findings.fix: Optionally add an AC item: '[ ] `grep -rE "Log\.(i|w|d)\(" core-runtime/src/main/` → 0 совпадений (TAC-5 subset).' Non-blocking — TAC-5 is globally enforced by Task 11/14.
